summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Arena Booking System - Hungarian sport and event booking platform. All core functionalities working correctly including user registration, admin management, event booking, and API endpoints.

integration_issues.issue: Admin sessions expire quickly requiring frequent re-login
Admin users redirected to homepage instead of admin dashboard after login

passed_tests: Homepage loads with sport categories section
Admin dashboard shows correct stats (1 sport, 1 event, 0->1 bookings, 2 users, 1 subadmin)
User can view sport events at /sports/{sportId}
User can view event details at /events/{eventId}
User can book an event successfully
All 20 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Sport arena design theme consistent throughout
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor session management improvements needed: 1) Extend admin session timeout or implement auto-refresh, 2) Redirect admin users to /admin dashboard after login instead of homepage. These are low-priority UX improvements.
